artifact_summary: This artifact displays a screenshot of a SCADA system interface titled 'HSP Motor Group LLS Manager'. It shows two panels: one displaying active alarms for motor group failures and another detailing configuration parameters like timers, motor counts, and rotation settings.
artifact_key_elements: HSP Motor Group LLS Manager interface
Alarms section (Motor Group Fail to Start/Stop)
Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners logos
artifact_blurb: This document page presents a screenshot of the 'HSP Motor Group LLS Manager' interface from a SCADA system. The left panel displays active alarms indicating a 'Motor Group Fail to Start' and 'Motor Group Fail to Stop'. The right panel details configuration settings including date-time alternation modes, timer-based delays, and specific motor group parameters such as the number of motors in the group, max/min run counts, and rotation settings.
